if.test: type != null and keyword != null and !keyword.equals('')

mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET is_answered = TRUE WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(q.qna_id) FROM qna q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE COALESCE(is_answered, 0) = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE writer_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(is_answered, 0) = 0

SELECT q.qna_id, q.title, q.writer_id, q.created_at, q.is_answered, q.view_count, u.nickname AS writerNickname FROM qna q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.writer_id = u.user_id ORDER BY COALESCE(q.is_answered, 0) ASC, q.qna_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT q.qna_id, q.title, q.writer_id, q.created_at, q.is_answered, q.view_count, u.nickname AS writerNickname FROM qna q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY q.qna_id DESC LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT q.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname FROM qna q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE q.qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna (title, content, writer_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{writerId})
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE qna_id = #{qnaId}
mapper.select: SELECT qr.*, u.nickname AS writerNickname FROM qna_reply qr LEFT JOIN user u ON qr.writer_id = u.user_id WHERE qr.qna_id = #{qnaId} ORDER BY qr.reply_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna_reply (qna_id, content, writer_id) VALUES (#{qnaId}, #{content}, #{writerId})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM faq ORDER BY faq_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO faq (category, question, answer) VALUES (#{category}, #{question}, #{answer})
